title: Same; use of affidavits, depositions and documents
doc_html:
§4824.  Same; use of affidavits, depositions and documents

All affidavits, depositions and documents which have been previously made, heard or used in court upon any proceedings in any case or matter, may be used before the commissioner.
doc_text:
§4824.  Same; use of affidavits, depositions and documents
All affidavits, depositions and documents which have been previously made, heard or used in court upon any proceedings in any case or matter, may be used before the commissioner.
